title: COSMIC DE’s First Seven Months
excerpt: A visual tour of the features and improvements of System76's COSMIC DE
content_html:
A Visual Tour

Smooth Gaming

New features like multiple full-screen windows per workspace, game launch fixes and input protocols additions smooth the COSMIC gaming experience. More gaming improvements are in the works.

Frosted Glass

Frosted Glass creates a more organic and immersive desktop experience. Customize the effect to suit your style in Settings > Desktop > Appearance > Frosted Glass.

Subtle and balanced

See-through

Nearly opaque

Consistent Corners

Non-COSMIC apps match the system corner style preference. GNOME and KDE apps blend well with COSMIC apps. Over time KDE apps may start supporting the Wayland blur protocol improving cross-desktop appearance.

Workspaces Overview Search

Type to search apps in the Launcher or Application Library directly from the Workspaces Overview. Set your preference in Settings > Desktop > Workspaces.

Launcher search

Application Library search

Workspaces Cycling Option

Cycle from the last to first workspace or stop at the last workspace. Set your preference in Settings > Desktop > Workspaces.

New COSMIC System Monitor

A birds eye view of your system resources. 

View all your resources and the top process for each resource from the Dashboard.

Resource detail pages show detailed graphs and top processes to give the resource graphs more context.

New Features Throughout

Features, quality improvements, and productivity enhancements abound since the initial release seven months ago.

Ellipses Text

COSMIC Text (our pure Rust text handling library) gained ellipses support and it’s been implemented throughout the desktop.

Tab, Drag and Drop in COSMIC Applications

Grab, drag and drop tabs in COSMIC Files, COSMIC Edit, and COSMIC Terminal.

New COSMIC Files Feature

COSMIC Files has become faster, more productive, and more privacy-conscious, with improvements to file management, navigation, and privacy controls.

  • Automatically select filename until the extension in rename and save dialog
  • Setting for type to select the first matching file or folder
  • Ability to enter network paths in the breadcrumb bar
  • Tab and shift-tab completion when path editing in the breadcrumb bar
  • Add open button in the Details pane when multiple files are chosen
  • Open multiple directories in separate tabs
  • “Move to” and “Copy to” context menu items
  • “Move to” and “Copy to” in the Edit menu
  • Setting to toggle the Recents feature
  • Add button to clear Recents
  • Add Clear Recents history to Recents nav bar context menu
  • Support pasting images, videos, and text from clipboard
  • Add context menu option to copy path when holding shift
  • New windows open at the location of the currently active tab
  • Implement search in Recents and Trash
  • Setting for open-with and permissions for multiple selected items
  • Add text file previews
  • Tab drag and drop

New COSMIC Terminal Features

COSMIC Terminal gives you more control over how you work, with configurable shortcuts, improved tab workflows, and enhanced support for different input methods.

  • Hold shift and click to add to a selection
  • Add --working-directory argument
  • “Copy link” added to context menu
  • Configurable shortcuts
  • Tab drag and drop
  • Option to open new tabs in current directory
  • Option to open new windows in the current directory
  • IME support

New COSMIC Settings Features

COSMIC Settings makes personalization and system management easier with improved search, networking, and customization options. Reassign your Caps Lock key to better match the way you work.

  • Type to search
  • Screen reader shortcut Super+Alt+S
  • Support for 2FA VPN connections
  • Option to apply RON theme files via the CLI
  • Wi-Fi: Add search functionality for filtering wifi networks
  • Option to swap control with caps lock
  • Setting to toggle workspace wrapping
  • Passkey/pin display dialog for bluetooth keyboard pairing

New COSMIC Player Features

COSMIC Player offers a smoother viewing experience with continuous playback, quick skip controls, and smarter audio handling.

  • Play next file automatically
  • Skip forward and backward playback controls
  • Playback speed options
  • Playback frame by frame controls
  • Mute when thumbnailing
  • Unmute when changing volume

And Many More Features and Improvements

  • Cosmic Applets

    • Use ellipsis
    • Display battery applet when there is no battery
    • Integrate nmrs for VPN, airplane mode, and secret agent

  • COSMIC Application Library

    • Reorder groups using drag and drop

  • COSMIC Comp

    • Sticky windows stay on top of fullscreen windows
    • Windows shadows
    • New options in Settings > Desktop > Appearance > Experimental settings:
      • Match system corners and apply shadows in floating mode
      • Match system corners in tiling mode
      • Apply shadows in tiling mode
    • Preserve fullscreen state when moving window between workspaces
    • Allow layout switching and brightness/volume control hotkeys under session lock
    • Implement pointer constraints protocol, which fixes cursor issues with video games
    • Support multiple fullscreen windows per workspace, which also stops steam big picture mode from unmaximizing after launching a game
    • Full screen game launch improvements

  • COSMIC Edit

    • Implement shift plus mouse click text selection
    • Tab drag and drop
    • Hide the scrollbar when it is not needed
    • Close application when last tab is closed

  • COSMIC Initial Setup

    • Now supports situations where the user has multiple displays plugged in on initial setup
    • Activate screen reader by default. Users that require the screen reader won’t need to know or lookup the shortcut to activate the screen reader.
    • Reorganize settings on the page to address user testing that revealed users would pass the first page without disabling the screen reader. The setting is now first and more prominent.

  • COSMIC Launcher

    • Ellipsize name and description

  • Cosmic Notifications

    • Parse html markup to rich text

  • COSMIC Panel

    • Increase autohide smoothness

  • COSMIC Screenshot

    • Remember last selected screenshot region

  • Cosmic Settings Daemon

    • Support Qt theme generation with qt5ct & qt6ct (for KDE apps)
    • Support external monitor brightness using DDC/CI

  • COSMIC Store

    • Wide performance improvements
    • Add mouse back navigation
    • Concurrently fetch backends
    • Add rpm-ostree backend
    • Allow opening RPM files

  • Cosmic Workspaces

    • Use ellipsis
    • Add middle mouse support to close top-level applications

  • xdg-desktop-portal-cosmic

    • Do not abort portal backend if dma-buf support is missing
    • Set pipewire data flags for memfd, potentially fixes issues with OBS screen cast
    • Only save config when rectangle drag ends
    • Add hotkeys Ctrl+C to copy to clipboard and Ctrl+S to copy to Pictures
    • Screenshot: Support XDG_SCREENSHOTS_DIR and Screenshots subfolder
    • Use oo7-portal as secret portal by default
    • Make the cursor show by default in screencast

  • Plus thousands more bits of polish throughout

Stay tuned

COSMIC development moves fast. Features are delivered as they’re completed, and we’re working on new features large and small that will surprise and delight users.

COSMIC DE from Scratch

From years of foundational work to a steady stream of rapid releases, COSMIC has evolved at an incredible pace.

About Us

System76 is the only open-source computing company building a full-stack Linux ecosystem – from hardware and firmware to operating system and desktop environments. System76 combines in-house manufacturing, repairable design, open firmware, privacy-respecting Pop!_OS, and COSMIC for a completely customizable out-of-the-box Linux experience that scales with you.

blocks.html_en:
• COSMIC Comp

    • Sticky windows stay on top of fullscreen windows
    • Windows shadows
    • New options in Settings > Desktop > Appearance > Experimental settings:
      • Match system corners and apply shadows in floating mode
      • Match system corners in tiling mode
      • Apply shadows in tiling mode
    • Preserve fullscreen state when moving window between workspaces
    • Allow layout switching and brightness/volume control hotkeys under session lock
    • Implement pointer constraints protocol, which fixes cursor issues with video games
    • Support multiple fullscreen windows per workspace, which also stops steam big picture mode from unmaximizing after launching a game
    • Full screen game launch improvements

sentences.en: COSMIC Comp Sticky windows stay on top of fullscreen windows Windows shadows New options in Settings > Desktop > Appearance > Experimental settings: Match system corners and apply shadows in floating mode Match system corners in tiling mode Apply shadows in tiling mode Preserve fullscreen state when moving window between workspaces Allow layout switching and brightness/volume control hotkeys under session lock Implement pointer constraints protocol, which fixes cursor issues with video games Support multiple fullscreen windows per workspace, which also stops steam big picture mode from unmaximizing after launching a game Full screen game launch improvements
sentences.zh: COSMIC Comp 粘性窗口停留在全屏窗口顶部 Windows 阴影 设置 > 桌面 > 外观 > 实验设置中的新选项： 在浮动模式下匹配系统角并应用阴影 在平铺模式下匹配系统角在平铺模式下应用阴影 在工作区之间移动窗口时保留全屏状态 允许在会话锁定下切换布局和亮度/音量控制热键 实施指针约束协议，该协议修复了视频游戏的光标问题 每个工作区支持多个全屏窗口，这也可阻止 Steam 大图片模式取消最大化启动游戏后全屏游戏启动改进

sentences.en: COSMIC Comp
sentences.zh: 宇宙比较

blocks.html_en:
• COSMIC Initial Setup

    • Now supports situations where the user has multiple displays plugged in on initial setup
    • Activate screen reader by default. Users that require the screen reader won’t need to know or lookup the shortcut to activate the screen reader.
    • Reorganize settings on the page to address user testing that revealed users would pass the first page without disabling the screen reader. The setting is now first and more prominent.

blocks.html_en:
• xdg-desktop-portal-cosmic

    • Do not abort portal backend if dma-buf support is missing
    • Set pipewire data flags for memfd, potentially fixes issues with OBS screen cast
    • Only save config when rectangle drag ends
    • Add hotkeys Ctrl+C to copy to clipboard and Ctrl+S to copy to Pictures
    • Screenshot: Support XDG_SCREENSHOTS_DIR and Screenshots subfolder
    • Use oo7-portal as secret portal by default
    • Make the cursor show by default in screencast

sentences.en: xdg-desktop-portal-cosmic Do not abort portal backend if dma-buf support is missing Set pipewire data flags for memfd, potentially fixes issues with OBS screen cast Only save config when rectangle drag ends Add hotkeys Ctrl+C to copy to clipboard and Ctrl+S to copy to Pictures Screenshot: Support XDG_SCREENSHOTS_DIR and Screenshots subfolder Use oo7-portal as secret portal by default Make the cursor show by default in screencast

sentences.en: About Us
sentences.zh: 关于我们

blocks.html_en: System76 is the only open-source computing company building a full-stack Linux ecosystem – from hardware and firmware to operating system and desktop environments. System76 combines in-house manufacturing, repairable design, open firmware, privacy-respecting Pop!_OS, and COSMIC for a completely customizable out-of-the-box Linux experience that scales with you.

sentences.en: System76 is the only open-source computing company building a full-stack Linux ecosystem – from hardware and firmware to operating system and desktop environments.
sentences.zh: System76 是唯一一家构建全栈 Linux 生态系统的开源计算公司——从硬件和固件到操作系统和桌面环境。

sentences.en: System76 combines in-house manufacturing, repairable design, open firmware, privacy-respecting Pop!_OS, and COSMIC for a completely customizable out-of-the-box Linux experience that scales with you.
sentences.zh: System76 结合了内部制造、可修复设计、开放固件、尊重隐私的 Pop!_OS 和 COSMIC，提供完全可定制的开箱即用 Linux 体验，可随您扩展。

content_html_zh:
视觉之旅

流畅的游戏体验

每个工作区多个全屏窗口、游戏启动修复和输入协议添加等新功能使 COSMIC 游戏体验更加流畅。 更多游戏改进正在进行中。

磨砂玻璃

磨砂玻璃创造了更加有机和身临其境的桌面体验。 在“设置”>“桌面”>“外观”>“磨砂玻璃”中自定义效果以适合您的风格。

微妙而平衡

透视

几乎不透明

一致的角点

非 COSMIC 应用程序符合系统角样式首选项。 GNOME 和 KDE 应用程序与 COSMIC 应用程序完美融合。 随着时间的推移，KDE 应用程序可能会开始支持 Wayland 模糊协议，从而改善跨桌面外观。

工作空间概览 搜索

直接从工作区概述中键入以搜索启动器或应用程序库中的应用程序。 在“设置”>“桌面”>“工作区”中设置您的首选项。

启动器搜索

应用程序库搜索

工作区循环选项

从最后一个工作区循环到第一个工作区或在最后一个工作区停止。 在“设置”>“桌面”>“工作区”中设置您的首选项。

新 COSMIC 系统监视器

系统资源的鸟瞰图。

从仪表板查看您的所有资源以及每个资源的顶级进程。

资源详细信息页面显示详细的图表和顶级进程，为资源图表提供更多上下文。

贯穿始终的新功能

自七个月前首次发布以来，功能、质量改进和生产力增强比比皆是。

省略号文本

COSMIC Text（我们的纯 Rust 文本处理库）获得了省略号支持，并且已在整个桌面上实现。

COSMIC 应用程序中的选项卡、拖放

在 COSMIC 文件、COSMIC 编辑和 COSMIC 终端中抓取、拖放选项卡。

新的 COSMIC 文件功能

随着文件管理、导航和隐私控制的改进，COSMIC Files 变得更快、更高效、更注重隐私。

  • 自动选择文件名，直到重命名和保存对话框中的扩展名
  • 设置类型以选择第一个匹配的文件或文件夹
  • 能够在面包屑栏中输入网络路径
  • 在面包屑栏中编辑路径时 Tab 和 Shift-Tab 补全
  • 选择多个文件时，在详细信息窗格中添加打开按钮
  • 在单独的选项卡中打开多个目录
  • “移动到”和“复制到”上下文菜单项
  • 编辑菜单中的“移动到”和“复制到”
  • 设置切换最近通话功能
  • 添加按钮以清除最近记录
  • 将清除最近历史记录添加到最近导航栏上下文菜单
  • 支持从剪贴板粘贴图像、视频和文本
  • 添加上下文菜单选项以在按住 Shift 时复制路径
  • 新窗口将在当前活动选项卡的位置打开
  • 在“最近”和“垃圾箱”中实施搜索
  • 多个选定项目的打开方式和权限设置
  • 添加文本文件预览
  • 选项卡拖放

新 COSMIC 终端功能

COSMIC Terminal 通过可配置的快捷键、改进的选项卡工作流程以及对不同输入法的增强支持，让您可以更好地控制自己的工作方式。

  • 按住 Shift 并单击以添加到选择
  • 添加 --working-directory 参数
  • “复制链接”添加到上下文菜单
  • 可配置的快捷键
  • 选项卡拖放
  • 在当前目录中打开新选项卡的选项
  • 在当前目录中打开新窗口的选项
  • 输入法支持

新的 COSMIC 设置功能

COSMIC 设置通过改进的搜索、网络和自定义选项使个性化和系统管理变得更加容易。 重新分配您的 Caps Lock 键以更好地匹配您的工作方式。

  • 输入搜索
  • 屏幕阅读器快捷键 Super+Alt+S
  • 支持 2FA VPN 连接
  • 通过 CLI 应用 RON 主题文件的选项
  • Wi-Fi：添加搜索功能以过滤 wifi 网络
  • 使用大写锁定交换控制的选项
  • 设置切换工作区环绕
  • 用于蓝牙键盘配对的密钥/密码显示对话框

新的 COSMIC 播放器功能

COSMIC Player 通过连续播放、快速跳过控制和更智能的音频处理提供更流畅的观看体验。

  • 自动播放下一个文件
  • 快进和快退播放控件
  • 播放速度选项
  • 逐帧播放控件
  • 缩略图时静音
  • 改变音量时取消静音

还有更多功能和改进

  • Cosmic 小程序 使用省略号 在没有电池时显示电池小程序 集成 VPN、飞行模式和秘密特工的 nmrs
  • COSMIC 应用程序库使用拖放重新排序组
  • COSMIC Comp 粘性窗口停留在全屏窗口顶部 Windows 阴影 设置 > 桌面 > 外观 > 实验设置中的新选项： 在浮动模式下匹配系统角并应用阴影 在平铺模式下匹配系统角在平铺模式下应用阴影 在工作区之间移动窗口时保留全屏状态 允许在会话锁定下切换布局和亮度/音量控制热键 实施指针约束协议，该协议修复了视频游戏的光标问题 每个工作区支持多个全屏窗口，这也可阻止 Steam 大图片模式取消最大化启动游戏后全屏游戏启动改进
  • COSMIC Edit 实现 Shift 加鼠标单击文本选择 选项卡拖放 不需要时隐藏滚动条 关闭最后一个选项卡时关闭应用程序
  • COSMIC 初始设置现在支持用户在初始设置时插入多个显示器的情况默认激活屏幕阅读器。 需要屏幕阅读器的用户不需要知道或查找激活屏幕阅读器的快捷方式。 重新组织页面上的设置，以解决用户测试显示用户将在不禁用屏幕阅读器的情况下通过第一页的问题。 现在，背景是第一位的，也更加突出。
  • COSMIC 启动器 Ellipsize 名称和描述
  • Cosmic 通知将 html 标记解析为富文本
  • COSMIC 面板 增加自动隐藏平滑度
  • COSMIC 截图 记住上次选择的截图区域
  • Cosmic 设置守护进程 支持使用 qt5ct 和 qt6ct 生成 Qt 主题（适用于 KDE 应用程序） 使用 DDC/CI 支持外部显示器亮度
  • COSMIC Store 广泛的性能改进 添加鼠标后退导航 并发获取后端 添加 rpm-ostree 后端 允许打开 RPM 文件
  • Cosmic Workspaces 使用省略号 添加鼠标中键支持以关闭顶级应用程序
  • xdg-desktop-portal-cosmic 如果缺少 dma-buf 支持，请勿中止门户后端 设置 memfd 的管道数据标志，可能修复 OBS 屏幕投射问题 仅在矩形拖动结束时保存配置 添加热键 Ctrl+C 复制到剪贴板，Ctrl+S 复制到图片 屏幕截图：支持 XDG_SCREENSHOTS_DIR 和屏幕截图子文件夹 默认情况下使用 oo7-portal 作为秘密门户截屏视频中默认显示光标
  • 加上数千个细节的润色

敬请关注

COSMIC 发展迅速。 功能在完成后即交付，我们正在开发大大小小的新功能，让用户感到惊讶和高兴。

从零开始的 COSMIC DE

从多年的基础工作到稳定的快速发布，COSMIC 以令人难以置信的速度发展。

关于我们

System76 是唯一一家构建全栈 Linux 生态系统的开源计算公司——从硬件和固件到操作系统和桌面环境。 System76 结合了内部制造、可修复设计、开放固件、尊重隐私的 Pop!_OS 和 COSMIC，提供完全可定制的开箱即用 Linux 体验，可随您扩展。
